techRadar.desc: Live news from Google Search → topic or calendar

schedule.desc: Find the best time to publish

userMenu.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to log out?

mode.label: Form mode
mode.advancedHint: Full control: type, tone, visuals, and Brand Voice.

sections.topicDesc: Describe what the content should be about — the rest follows from this.
sections.formatDesc: Where you publish and which content type we generate.
sections.voiceDesc: Who you’re writing for, in what tone and language.
sections.campaignDesc: Goal and duration for a multi-channel campaign.
sections.videoDesc: Transcript, aspect ratio, and reference image.
sections.visualDesc: Image style and aspect ratio for the platform.

quick.needAdvanced: Need campaign, video, or A/B test?

autoPublish.title: Auto-publish
autoPublish.description: After generation, content is published to connected accounts automatically.
autoPublish.optimizePerPlatform: Adapt copy for each platform before publishing
autoPublish.qualityGateHint: Publishing only runs when the quality gate score is ≥ {{min}}.

techRadar.title: Tech Radar
techRadar.description: Fresh news from Google Search for your niche — ready post angles.
techRadar.empty: Enter a niche and click Search news.

template.label: Template
template.tooltip: Select an existing template to quickly fill the form. You can also save the current settings as a new template for future use.

topic.label: Topic or main message
topic.placeholder: e.g., Introducing a new, eco-friendly shoe model...
topic.tooltip: Enter the main theme, product, or message you want to convey. The more details you provide (e.g., benefits, features), the better the result will be.
topic.assistantTooltip: Get AI suggestions to improve your topic
topic.repurposePrompt: Paste text or a URL to extract a topic:
topic.repurposeTooltip: Paste text to extract a topic

videoTranscript.label: Transcript or text for video
videoTranscript.tooltip: Paste the text to be used as narration or subtitles in the generated video. AI will use it to create scenes.
videoTranscript.placeholder: Enter text that should appear in the video or be its basis.

form.videoTopicPlaceholder: A short, dynamic video about [your product/topic]
form.videoTranscriptPlaceholderDefault:
Scene 1: A close-up shot of [your product].
Scene 2: Someone using [your product] and looking happy.
Scene 3: A final shot showing the product logo and a call to action.

campaignGoal.label: Campaign Goal
campaignGoal.tooltip: Define the main goal of your campaign, e.g., 'Promote a new, eco-friendly shoe model', 'Increase newsletter sign-ups'.

campaignDuration.label: Campaign duration (in days)
campaignDuration.tooltip: Specify how many days the campaign should last. AI will generate a post plan for this period (minimum 3, maximum 30 days).

audience.label: Target audience
audience.tooltip: Describe your ideal audience, e.g., 'Young professionals interested in sustainable development', 'Fitness enthusiasts looking for healthy snacks'.

keywords.label: Keywords (comma-separated)
keywords.tooltip: Provide keywords for the AI to focus on. This helps in precise topic targeting and SEO optimization.

tone.label: Tone of voice
tone.tooltip: Choose the tone that best fits your brand and message. This will affect the style and vocabulary of the generated text.

contentLanguage.label: Post content language
contentLanguage.tooltip: Choose the language for AI-generated post text, hashtags, and analyses. Independent from the app menu language.

platform.label: Platform
platform.tooltip: Select the target platform(s). AI will adapt the format, length, and style of the content to the specifics of each one.

visualStyle.label: Visual Style
visualStyle.tooltip: Specify the style of the image to be generated. 'Platform Specific' will try to use a style popular on the selected platform.

contentType.label: Content Type
contentType.tooltip: 'Post' is standard organic content. 'Advertisement' will generate content with a headline and call to action (CTA), optimized for paid promotions.

aiModel.label: AI Model
aiModel.tooltip: 'Flash' is faster, ideal for simpler tasks. 'Pro' (premium feature) is more advanced and generates more creative, complex content.

aspectRatio.label: Aspect Ratio
aspectRatio.tooltip: Choose the aspect ratio for the generated image.
aspectRatio.tooltipVideo: Choose the aspect ratio for the generated video (landscape or portrait).

imageForVideo.label: Starting Image for Video
imageForVideo.tooltip: Upload an image that will be the first frame of your video. The AI will bring it to life.

calendar.plannerSubtitle: Describe your goal, and the AI will create a strategic content plan for your calendar.
calendar.goalPlaceholder: e.g., Promote a new summer collection of dresses
calendar.planError: Failed to generate the plan. Please try again.
calendar.planActive: An AI-generated strategic plan is active. These are suggestions you can generate.

cadence.label: Cadence template
cadence.growthDesc: Mon–Fri: 2 posts + reel. Sat–Sun: post + reel.
cadence.aggressiveDesc: Mon–Fri: 2 posts + story + reel. High-intensity growth.

fill.title: Fill calendar
fill.subtitle: Pick a cadence template and AI will fill the week with slots (posts + reels).
fill.subtitleRange: AI will fill the visible week ({{range}}) with slots — posts and reels.

calendar.clearPlanConfirmMessage: This removes all plan slots from the calendar. Scheduled posts stay.

intelligence.pinnedTime: Preferred time {{time}} saved — we’ll use it for new slots.

empty.title: Calendar is empty
empty.hint: Use “Fill week” above or click any day to plan content.

dayDrawer.label: Day plan
dayDrawer.emptyHeroHint: AI will suggest ideas shortly, or tap below.
dayDrawer.noScheduled: No scheduled posts for this day.
dayDrawer.noSlots: No slots yet — fill the plan or generate AI ideas.
dayDrawer.ideasHint: AI will match format and platform to your niche

slot.deleteMessage: The slot will be removed from the plan. This can’t be undone.
slot.bannerHint: After generation, content passes the quality gate (up to 2 auto-fixes), then is added to scheduled posts.

bulk.title: Publish queue
bulk.subtitle: Select ready posts — confirm schedule or publish now.
bulk.empty: No ready posts in this range.

topicAssistant.title: Topic Assistant
topicAssistant.subtitle: Get help from AI to refine your post's topic.
topicAssistant.requestPlaceholder: e.g., make it more engaging, suggest 3 variations

generatorView.title: Content generator
generatorView.subtitle: From topic to a ready post — quick mode or full control.
generatorView.viewingHistory: You are viewing a saved item.
generatorView.generatingHint: Creating content tailored to your brand. This usually takes a few seconds.

tips.shortTopic: Your topic is short. Add an emotional hook to boost click-through.
tips.question: Add a question at the end to invite comments.
tips.longPost: The post is fairly long — bullet points will improve readability.
tips.cta: A clear call to action (CTA) is missing.
tips.abTest: Great topic — try A/B Test to compare two angles.
tips.contentMix: Recent posts are mostly images — mix in video or stories.

historySection.title: History
historySection.author: Author: {{name}}
historySection.noAnalyses: No additional analyses for this item.

draftsSection.title: Drafts
draftsSection.empty: Your saved drafts will appear here.

ready.title: Ready for AI magic?
ready.subtitle: Your generated content will appear here.

resultCard.pleaseWait: Please wait, AI is creating magic.

qualityGate.title: Quality gate
qualityGate.improve: A few tweaks will boost reach.

publish.timeHint: Suggested time based on your audience activity.

trialBanner.title: 7 days of Pro free
trialBanner.subtitle: Unlock {{credits}} credits, analytics, strategist, and video — full Pro for a week.
trialBanner.fine_print: Card required • Cancel anytime • No fake countdown
trialBanner.error_used: You’ve already used your free trial.

pricing.title: Subscription plans
pricing.subtitle: Higher plan = more credits and a lower cost per credit. Billed in USD (Stripe).
pricing.guest_banner: Pick a plan — after sign-up we’ll take you to secure Stripe checkout.
pricing.packs_subtitle: One-time purchase — credits don’t expire while your account is active.
pricing.disclaimer: PLN amounts are estimates (~4.2 PLN/USD). Stripe invoices in USD. One-time packs cost more per credit than a subscription.
pricing.error_login_pack: Log in to buy a credit pack.

plan_desc.free: Try AI with no card — limits match your account caps.
plan_desc.creator: Freelancers and creators — calendar, video, and brand voice.
plan_desc.pro: Best solo pick — analytics, strategist, and 5 brand profiles.
plan_desc.business: Marketing teams — API, 6,000 credits, and 20 brand profiles.
plan_desc.agency: Agencies — 18,000 credits, more video than Business, unlimited campaigns.

hero.title: Social posts that sound like your brand
hero.subtitle: Generate ready-to-publish content and plan your calendar in one place — no credit card.
hero.preview_topic: Launch of a new AI Content Pro feature
hero.preview_body: Your team can generate on-brand posts, plan publishing, and see what works — in one workflow.

how_it_works.title: Simple in 3 steps
how_it_works.subtitle: From idea to a ready post in under a minute — without switching tools.
how_it_works.step1_desc: Topic, audience, and tone — that’s enough to start.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Match the platform and content type to your brand.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Copy, schedule, or refine the draft before you post.

features.title: Three modules, one workflow
features.subtitle: Generate, plan, and review content in one place.
features.generator_desc: Brand-aligned posts — ready to edit and publish.
features.planner_desc: Marketing goal → multi-day schedule with content ideas.
features.analytics_desc: See which posts work and when to publish.

use_cases.title: How people use it
use_cases.subtitle: Concrete scenarios — no fake reviews.
use_cases.item1_desc: Fast post variants under one brand voice.
use_cases.item2_desc: Generator + planner instead of several separate tools.
use_cases.item3_desc: Stay consistent without starting from a blank page.

faq.title: Common questions
faq.subtitle: Short answers about the generator — or create your first post now.
faq.a1: No. The tool guides you from goal and audience to a ready post with CTA and hashtags.
faq.q2: Can I edit content before publishing?
faq.a2: Yes. Generate a draft, then refine the tone or create more versions.
faq.q3: How soon will I see results?
faq.a3: Usually right away: more consistent posting and faster iteration. Analytics then helps with timing.

final_cta.title: Generate your first post in minutes
final_cta.subtitle: Create an account and start in the generator — no credit card.
final_cta.subtitle_logged_in: Go back to the generator and keep creating.

assistant.greeting: Hello! How can I help you with this text? Feel free to speak or type commands.

tooltip.disabled: Add at least 3 favorite posts to unlock
tooltip.enabled: Analyze favorites to define a Brand Voice

status.disabled: Add {{count}} more post(s) for the AI to learn.
status.enabled: AI will analyze your favorite posts to define a Brand Voice.

brandVoiceManager.title: Manage Brand Voices
brandVoiceManager.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g., We create AI tools for marketers...
brandVoiceManager.keywordsPlaceholder: e.g., AI, marketing, social media, productivity
brandVoiceManager.avoidPlaceholder: e.g., overly formal language, complex jargon
brandVoiceManager.dosPlaceholder: Enter a sentence that captures your brand's style...
brandVoiceManager.dontsPlaceholder: Enter a sentence that is in the wrong style...
brandVoiceManager.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this profile?

analysisModal.title: AI Analysis
analysisModal.promptPlaceholderImage: e.g., Describe the composition of this image, suggest improvements.
analysisModal.promptPlaceholderText: e.g., What is the sentiment of this text? Suggest 3 other headlines.

visualStudio.title: AI Visual Studio
visualStudio.subtitle: Edit the image with text prompts or adjust it manually.
visualStudio.promptPlaceholder: e.g., 'add sunglasses to the dog', 'change the background to a beach'
visualStudio.errorLoad: Could not load image for editing. This might be due to CORS policy. Try using another image.

errors.api_not_available: AI API is not available. Check your API key or log in.
errors.limit_reached: Usage limit for your plan has been reached.
errors.insufficient_credits: You need {{cost}} credits (you have {{credits}}). Upgrade your plan or buy a credit pack.

apiKeyInvalid.title: API Key Problem
apiKeyInvalid.details: Your API key is invalid or lacks permissions. Please check your key settings in Google AI Studio.

safetyBlock.title: Content Blocked
safetyBlock.details: The generated content was blocked for safety reasons. Please try modifying your prompt.

rateLimit.title: Rate Limit Exceeded
rateLimit.details: You are sending too many requests. Please try again in a moment.

videoKeyRequired.title: Video API Key Required
videoKeyRequired.details: Video generation requires selecting an API key with billing enabled. Please select a key to continue.

errors.unknownError: An unknown error occurred. Please try refreshing the page.

userFacing.refreshAction: Refresh the page (Cmd+Shift+R) and try again.
userFacing.safetyAction: Remove sensitive words or simplify the topic.
userFacing.quotaAction: Wait about an hour or enable billing in Google AI Studio.
userFacing.apiKeyAction: Check your key in Google AI Studio and select a billed project.
userFacing.authMessage: Please sign in again to continue.
userFacing.authAction: Sign out and sign back in.
userFacing.favoritesAction: Refresh the page. If it persists — sign out and back in.
userFacing.videoUnavailable: The video engine is temporarily unavailable.
userFacing.videoRetryAction: Try again shortly or pick another engine (Auto / Luma).
userFacing.videoTimeoutAction: Shorten the post text or try Instagram Story style.
userFacing.staleBundleMessage: Your browser is using an old JS bundle.
userFacing.networkAction: Check your internet and refresh the page.
userFacing.timeoutMessage: The server did not respond in time.
userFacing.serverMessage: Something went wrong on the API side.
userFacing.genericAction: Try again or refresh the page.

appVersion.title: A new version is available
appVersion.defaultChangelog: New release — better error messages, update banner, and Quick mode in the generator.

videoStory.fallbackMessage: Veo was unavailable — an alternative engine was used.
videoStory.title: AI Video Stories
videoStory.subtitle: Turn your post into a video story
videoStory.selectAndGenerate: Pick a style and click Generate
videoStory.poweredBy: Powered by Google Veo & Luma AI

styles.carouselDesc: Series of slides with key points

repurpose.title: Content Repurposing Engine

inventory.empty: No previous content — the strategy will be built from scratch.

videoKeyModal.title: API Key Required

dashboard.noTrends: No trends found. Try another niche.
dashboard.subtitle: Your social intelligence is ready. Our algorithms analyzed {{count}} posts and are ready for new challenges.

weeklySummary.title: Weekly Summary
weeklySummary.start: Start creating content to see your weekly summary!
weeklySummary.summary: This week, you've mostly created content for {{platform}} in a {{tone}} tone. Keep up the great work!

storyboard.title: AI Storyboard Creator
storyboard.subtitle: Bring your ideas to life. Describe a topic, and AI will generate a complete video script.
storyboard.topicPlaceholder: e.g., a 30-second ad for a new coffee brand

firstPost.name: First Step
firstPost.description: Generate your very first piece of content.

form.goalLabel: Primary business goal for the next quarter

form.audiencePlaceholder: e.g., Tech-savvy millennials, small business owners
form.competitorsLabel: Competitors' social media URLs (optional, one per line)

loading.title: AI is conducting your strategic audit...
loading.subtitle: This may take a minute. We're analyzing market data and your content history to build the best strategy.

locked.title: Unlock the AI Strategist
